Uses of Interface
javax.media.mscontrol.Parameters

Packages that use Parameters
javax.media.mscontrol Provides a java Application Server with a Media Server Control API. 
javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup A MediaGroup is mostly a player/recorder. 
javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.signals provides resources for detecting and generating signals: DTMF, speech, .... for any type of media 
javax.media.mscontrol.mixer A MediaMixer has the capacity to combine the media streams coming from multiple sources, into a single media stream. 
javax.media.mscontrol.vxml Capabilities to control VoiceXML dialogs that are delegated to the Media Server. 
 

Uses of Parameters in javax.media.mscontrol
 

Fields in javax.media.mscontrol declared as Parameters
static Parameters Parameters.NO_PARAMETER
          A typed constant to use when no parameter is required:
play("my_file.wav, myRTCs, Parameters.NO_PARAMETER);
 

Methods in javax.media.mscontrol that return Parameters
 Parameters MediaObject.createParameters()
          Create an empty Parameters map
 Parameters MsControlFactory.createParameters()
          Create an empty Parameters map
 Parameters MediaObject.getParameters(Parameter[] params)
          Gets the value of various Parameter's from the media object.
 

Methods in javax.media.mscontrol with parameters of type Parameters
 MediaConfig MediaConfig.createCustomizedClone(Parameters params)
          Create a new MediaConfig, altering the given parameters with the given values.
 MediaGroup MediaSession.createMediaGroup(Configuration<MediaGroup> predefinedConfig, Parameters params)
          Create a MediaGroup.
 MediaGroup MediaSession.createMediaGroup(MediaConfig config, Parameters params)
          Create a MediaGroup.
 MediaMixer MediaSession.createMediaMixer(Configuration<MediaMixer> predefinedConfig, Parameters params)
          Create a MediaMixer.
 MediaMixer MediaSession.createMediaMixer(MediaConfig config, Parameters params)
          Create a MediaMixer.
 NetworkConnection MediaSession.createNetworkConnection(Configuration<NetworkConnection> predefinedConfig, Parameters params)
          Create a NetworkConnection.
 NetworkConnection MediaSession.createNetworkConnection(MediaConfig config, Parameters params)
          Create a NetworkConnection.
 VxmlDialog MediaSession.createVxmlDialog(Parameters parameters)
          A VxmlDialog is a Joinable object that can interpret a vxml script
 void MediaObject.setParameters(Parameters params)
          Set the value of various Parameter's for the media object.
 

Uses of Parameters in javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup
 

Methods in javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup with parameters of type Parameters
 void Player.play(java.net.URI[] streamIDs, RTC[] rtc, Parameters optargs)
          Play the items in a play list sequentially (a composite prompt), identified by the streamIDs.
 void Player.play(java.net.URI streamID, RTC[] rtc, Parameters optargs)
          Play a single play item named by streamID.
 void Recorder.record(java.net.URI streamID, RTC[] rtc, Parameters optargs)
          Record data into the named container (usually a file, local or http), designated by a java.net.URI class.
 

Uses of Parameters in javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.signals
 

Methods in javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.signals with parameters of type Parameters
 void SignalGenerator.emitSignals(java.lang.String signals, RTC[] rtc, Parameters optargs)
          Transmit a series of signals out the Terminal to the network.
 void SignalGenerator.emitSignals(Value[] signals, RTC[] rtc, Parameters optargs)
          Transmit a series of signals out the Terminal to the network.
 void SignalDetector.receiveSignals(int numSignals, Parameter[] patternLabels, RTC[] rtcs, Parameters optargs)
          Retrieves some signals from the signal buffer.
 

Uses of Parameters in javax.media.mscontrol.mixer
 

Methods in javax.media.mscontrol.mixer with parameters of type Parameters
 MixerAdapter MediaMixer.createMixerAdapter(Configuration<MixerAdapter> predefinedConfig, Parameters params)
          Create a MixerAdapter.
 MixerAdapter MediaMixer.createMixerAdapter(MediaConfig config, Parameters params)
          Create a MixerAdapter.
 

Uses of Parameters in javax.media.mscontrol.vxml
 

Methods in javax.media.mscontrol.vxml with parameters of type Parameters
 void VxmlDialog.prepare(java.lang.String inlinedScript, Parameters options, java.util.Map<java.lang.String,java.lang.Object> sessionVariables)
          Same as VxmlDialog.prepare(URL, Parameters, Map), but the vxml script is provided in line, as the first argument.
 void VxmlDialog.prepare(java.net.URL vxmlScript, Parameters options, java.util.Map<java.lang.String,java.lang.Object> sessionVariables)
          Request the preparation of the execution of the given vxml script.
